name: @soltrade/execution-wallet-admission
description: Admission Gate (Gate C / C2): activate_execution_wallet mock/in-memory. Fail-safe gating WARMING_UP -> ACTIVE only after permission + wallet/signer state + mock readiness + Hard Risk completeness. Admission != signing and != sending; no key material; no KeyManager; no RPC; no DB; no REAL-LIVE; no execution authority.
